moments.title: The Open Championship Final Day
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Portrush concludes today, with the final rounds determining who lifts the Claret Jug.

angles.name: Final Day Drama
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! The final day of The Open Championship from Royal Portrush is underway. Who are you backing to make history and claim the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Golf Glory
angles.copy: After a week of incredible golf, The Open Championship reaches its thrilling conclusion today. Every shot counts as the world's best battle for glory.

moments.title: Latitude Festival Wraps Up
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival 2026, featuring headliners like David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi, is in full swing at Henham Park, Suffolk, concluding tomorrow, July 20th.

angles.name: Latitude Live
angles.copy: The fields of Henham Park are buzzing! Latitude Festival is delivering an incredible weekend of music, comedy and arts. Who have you caught so far?

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is wrapping up its 20th edition this weekend. From David Byrne to Lewis Capaldi, it's been a celebration of music and culture.

moments.title: Brian May turns 79
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist Sir Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today, July 19th.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Sir Brian May! Guitar icon, astrophysicist, and rock legend. What's your favourite Queen riff?

angles.name: Queen's Guitar God
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Brian May today as he turns 79! The man behind so many iconic Queen anthems. Send him your best!

moments.title: Carlos Santana turns 79
moments.blurb: Mexican-American guitar virtuoso Carlos Santana, known for pioneering Latin-infused rock, celebrates his 79th birthday tomorrow, July 20th.

angles.name: Guitar Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Carlos Santana tomorrow! The man whose guitar makes magic. What's your favourite Santana track?

angles.name: Santana's Sound
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the incredible Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday. His unique blend of rock, Latin, and jazz has influenced generations.

moments.title: Royal Welsh Show Opens
moments.blurb: The Royal Welsh Show, a pinnacle event in the British agricultural calendar, opens tomorrow, July 20th, running until July 23rd at the showground in Llanelwedd.

angles.name: Welsh Show Excitement
angles.copy: It's almost time! The Royal Welsh Show kicks off tomorrow, bringing four days of agriculture, entertainment, and Welsh culture to Llanelwedd. Who's heading there?

angles.name: Highlight of the Calendar
angles.copy: The biggest event in the Welsh agricultural calendar, the Royal Welsh Show, opens its gates tomorrow! Get ready for livestock, crafts, food, and fun.

moments.title: Cat Stevens (Yusuf Islam) turns 78
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter Cat Stevens, also known as Yusuf Islam, famous for hits like 'Wild World' and 'Father and Son', celebrates his 78th birthday on Tuesday, July 21st.

angles.name: Folk Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Sending Happy 78th Birthday wishes to the iconic Cat Stevens (Yusuf Islam) for Tuesday! His timeless songs continue to resonate. What's your top pick?

angles.name: Timeless Tunes
angles.copy: On Tuesday, we celebrate the 78th birthday of Cat Stevens, a true master of songwriting. His music is pure poetry.

moments.title: Don Henley turns 79
moments.blurb: Don Henley, drummer and co-lead vocalist for the Eagles and a successful solo artist, will celebrate his 79th birthday on Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Legend Birthday
angles.copy: On Wednesday, we're celebrating the 79th birthday of the legendary Don Henley! From the Eagles to his solo career, his voice is unmistakable.

angles.name: Voice of a Generation
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to Don Henley this Wednesday! The man behind 'Hotel California' and 'Boys of Summer'. What's your favourite?

moments.title: Slash turns 61
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses' iconic lead guitarist, Slash (Saul Hudson), known for his distinctive top hat and bluesy riffs, celebrates his 61st birthday on Thursday, July 23rd.

angles.name: Guitar God Birthday
angles.copy: Get ready to shred! This Thursday, the one and only Slash turns 61. What's your absolute favourite Guns N' Roses solo?

angles.name: Top Hat & Riffs
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to rock icon Slash on Thursday! That signature sound and legendary stage presence. What song instantly makes you think of him?

moments.title: WOMAD Festival Begins
moments.blurb: The World of Music, Arts and Dance (WOMAD) festival kicks off on Thursday, July 23rd, running until July 26th at its new Neston Park Estate home in Wiltshire.

angles.name: World of WOMAD
angles.copy: WOMAD Festival opens its doors on Thursday! Get ready for a global journey of music, arts, and dance at its new Wiltshire home. Who's excited?

angles.name: Festival Discovery
angles.copy: Beyond the headlines: WOMAD Festival brings incredible artists from around the world to Wiltshire starting Thursday. Discover your new favourite act!

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez, known for her chart-topping music and acting career, celebrates her 57th birthday on Friday, July 24th.

angles.name: J.Lo's Birthday Bash
angles.copy: It's a party for J.Lo! Jennifer Lopez turns 57 this Friday. What's your go-to track from the multi-talented superstar?

angles.name: Still Jenny From The Block
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Jennifer Lopez on her 57th birthday this Friday! A true icon in music, film, and fashion.

moments.title: Camp Bestival Dorset Starts
moments.blurb: The family-friendly Camp Bestival Dorset kicks off on Friday, July 24th, running until July 27th, promising a weekend of music, arts, and fun at Lulworth Castle.

angles.name: Family Festival Fun
angles.copy: Who's ready for Camp Bestival Dorset? The ultimate family festival begins this Friday at Lulworth Castle! Get set for a weekend of pure joy.

angles.name: Dorset Delights
angles.copy: Camp Bestival Dorset starts Friday! More than just music, it's an adventure for all ages. What are you most looking forward to?

moments.title: Kendal Calling Begins
moments.blurb: Kendal Calling, the award-winning festival in the Lake District, starts on Friday, July 24th, bringing a diverse lineup of music and arts to Cumbria until July 27th.

angles.name: Lakeside Festival
angles.copy: Kendal Calling kicks off this Friday in the stunning Lake District! Four days of incredible music and good times await. Who are you seeing?

angles.name: Cumbrian Calling
angles.copy: The fields of Cumbria are about to come alive! Kendal Calling starts Friday with a fantastic lineup. Get ready for an unforgettable weekend.

moments.title: Steelhouse Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Wales's biggest rock festival, Steelhouse, takes over the Brecon Beacons from Saturday, July 25th to July 27th, featuring a lineup of classic and modern rock acts.

angles.name: Welsh Rock Weekend
angles.copy: The mountains will be rocking! Steelhouse Festival, Wales's premier rock event, starts this Saturday in the Brecon Beacons. Are you ready?

angles.name: Heavy Metal Hills
angles.copy: Steelhouse Festival brings the noise to the Brecon Beacons this Saturday! Get ready for a weekend of pure rock energy.

moments.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
moments.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, the iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, known for his electrifying stage presence, will celebrate his 83rd birthday on Sunday, July 26th.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Royalty
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Wishing a very Happy 83rd Birthday to the legendary Sir Mick Jagger this Sunday! What's your favourite Stones classic?

angles.name: Ageless Performer
angles.copy: On Sunday, we celebrate the 83rd birthday of the one and only Mick Jagger. His energy is unmatched!

moments.title: Sidmouth Folk Festival Starts
moments.blurb: The acclaimed Sidmouth Folk Festival begins on Tuesday, July 28th, bringing a week of traditional and contemporary folk music to the Devon coast until August 4th.

angles.name: Devon Folk Fun
angles.copy: Sidmouth Folk Festival kicks off this Tuesday! Get ready for a week of incredible music, dance, and culture on the beautiful Devon coast. Who's heading down?

angles.name: Coastal Melodies
angles.copy: The sounds of folk music will fill the air as Sidmouth Folk Festival begins on Tuesday! A fantastic week of tradition and talent awaits in Devon.

moments.title: Love Island UK - Mid-Season Drama
moments.blurb: Love Island UK is in full swing, with daily drama, recouplings, and bombshells keeping viewers hooked as the islanders search for love in the villa.

angles.name: Islander Antics
angles.copy: The Love Island villa is delivering daily! Who's making moves, who's in trouble, and who's about to be dumped? Catch up on all the drama!

angles.name: Villa Gossip
angles.copy: Another day, another dose of Love Island drama! What are your predictions for tonight's episode? Who's your favourite couple (or least favourite)?
